name: Ookla for Networks
description: Crowdsourced network intelligence platform aggregating billions of Speedtest measurements to provide competitive benchmarking and coverage insights at scale.
howItWorks: Ookla aggregates opt-in performance measurements from the Speedtest app — hundreds of millions of monthly tests. Operators access this data through the Ookla for Networks portal, filtered by geography, time period, device type, and operator. The result is a continuous, large-scale view of how every operator performs in every geography from real subscriber devices.
